title: stisseria lepida
intro: Stisseria lepida, also known as the climbing milkweed or woolly milkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Stisseria lepida has been found to possess medicinal properties that aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. The plant's roots and stems are rich in alkaloids and other compounds that offer health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Stisseria lepida is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
